groups.title: Washing Machine Warranty
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Personal details • Name: Judie Smith • Reference number: $1$ • Time of purchase: $2$ ago • Current address: 120 $3$, Oxford • Postcode: $4$ Problems • The floor was wet because of the $5$. • The washing machine was out of control and the woman $6$ immediately. • The floor is made of $7$. Arrangement for the repair work • Ask a $8$ to repair the washing machine. • The repairman is available $9$. • The woman's house is opposite the $10$.

questions.title: The floor was wet because of the 【   】.
The washing machine was out of control and the woman 【   】 immediately.
Ask a 【   】 to repair the washing machine.
The woman's house is opposite the 【   】.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: This is the Customer Service Department of Kingswell Washing Machine.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Roger speaking, how may I help you?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I'm calling about the washing machine I bought from the mall several months ago.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: There's something wrong with it at the moment, so what do I have to do?

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: OK, first I need to get a few details about this.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Could you give me your name, please?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Yes, it's Judie Smith.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: I need one more thing.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: There's a reference number.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: It should be in the top right-hand corner of the warranty card we gave you.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Let me have a look … Oh, here it is.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's CWX576884.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Thanks.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Well, I need to make sure if your washing machine is still within the warranty period, so when did you buy it?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, sure.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I remember I bought it last summer, so … it was about 9 months ago.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: And the card here says this washing machine has a 2-year warranty, so it's definitely within the period.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Of course it is, Madam.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: All right, then I need your address?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: My old address or my current one?

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Your current one, as we will send in someone to fix the washing machine for you.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's 120 Middle Street, Oxford.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: And the postcode?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's GO19 4KE.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Now I need to know the exact problem of the washing machine.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Could you describe it in detail?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Actually the washing machine did work very well until last weekend.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I put some clothes into it, and it worked normally at first, then I just got down to doing some gardening.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: But after about 30 minutes when I came back to the house, I found it was leaking!

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: The water had soaked the entire floor.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: I'm sorry to hear that, Madam.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: So did you do anything to make the leaking stop?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: At that moment, the washing machine was totally out of control, and the alarm on it also started to sound.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: I thought there was not much point in pressing any button on the machine, so I just switched off the machine straight away.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Then it stopped leaking at once, thank goodness!

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Well, I think that was the only thing you could do.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh then, I found my floor was nearly a disaster.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: As it is made of wood rather than marble, it could not be soaked in water for a long time, so what I did in the next 2 hours was wiping up the water on the floor!

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Later I tried the washing machine once more, but the problem still existed.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Well, I've taken down all the related information.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Later we'll send a client engineer to your house to fix it.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Could you arrange the repair work as soon as possible, as I'm too busy at work to do the laundry by hand?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: How about this Saturday?

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Umm … I have to check the schedule of the repairman … Oh sorry, Madam, Saturday has been occupied.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Is that OK with you?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Fine, I can take a leave from work that day.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Anyway, thanks.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Oh, my house is easy to find.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: All right.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: And the last thing, could you tell me your phone number, please?

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Sure.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: I've got it.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: The repairman will contact you before he comes.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Thank you very much.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: You're welcome.

transcript.speaker: Roger
transcript.en: Bye!

transcript.speaker: Woman
transcript.en: Bye!

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Reference number；提示词 Reference number，此处应填字母和数字的组合。
题目解析：第 1-4 题考查个人信息填空。本题中的定位词 Reference number（参考编号）不容易发生替换，只需要跟上音频记录下字母和数字的组合即可。因此答案为 CWX576884。注意 double eight 会出现连读。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 purchase；提示词 Time，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：定位词 purchase 在录音中被替换为 buy，提示词 Time 以 when 体现，注意听之后出现的时间。首先出现了 last summer，但与题干的 ago 无法搭配使用，可排除。随后出现了答案信息：“… it was about 9 months ago.”需要注意的是，答案信息出现后又出现了一个干扰时间 2-year，不但词性不合适，且不符合题干限定 purchase，因为它是 warranty period（保修期限）。因此答案为 9 months 或 nine months。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 address；提示词 address，此处应填地址，格式为“路名＋路”。
题目解析：题干的条件限定为 Current，意味着录音中很可能会出现 old/previous address 作为干扰信息。另外，表示路的词汇一般为 road、street、avenue、lane、drive 这几个词，而表示路名的单词，录音中通常不会给出拼写，但有规律可循，大部分路名是景观类词汇，如 forest、mountain、lake 等，也可能是方位类词汇，如 north、south 等，本题答案恰好属于后者。因此答案为 Middle Street。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Postcode；提示词 Postcode，此处应填字母和数字的组合。
题目解析：定位词 Postcode 无法替换，跟上录音即可，但需要注意的是，本题紧跟上一题，答案出现较快，在听到含有 postcode 的问句时，就要集中注意力迅速写下答案。若前一题的地址还没写完，建议平时多练习使用简写，如用 St. 表示 street。因此答案为 GO19 4KE。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 floor、wet；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 floor 出现在答案后，wet 在录音中被替换为 soaked，所以在做该题时需要有意识地先抓取符合答案的名词，结合场景以及前一句所提到的洗衣机漏水（it was leaking）也可以找到答案词。因此答案为 water。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 out of control；提示词 and、immediately，此处应填动词过去式。
题目解析：定位词 out of control 在录音中原词重现，但需要注意空白处应填写的动作是 the woman 发出的。out of control 之后出现的动作有 started to sound、pressing any button、switched off、stopped leaking，只有 pressing any button 和 switched off 是这位女士发出的动作，且 pressing any button 以否定形式出现。另外，题干中的 immediately 在录音中被替换为 straight away。因此答案为 switched off。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 floor；提示词 is made of，此处应填表示材质的名词。
题目解析：本题难度不大，定位词和提示词均在录音中原词重现，注意通过否定信号词 rather than 来排除干扰信息 marble。因此答案为 wood。

8.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 Ask、a，此处应填表示人的名词。
题目解析：考虑到 Ask 和 repair 的同义替换较多，所以本题没有很好的定位词。在预判出空白处要填表示人的名词之后，有意识地去抓取符合预判的词汇即可。录音中没有干扰信息，并将题干中的 repair 替换成了 fix（这是一对高频替换词）。因此答案为 client engineer。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 repairman；提示词 available，此处应填时间类名词。
题目解析：本题难度不大，在女士问“How about this Saturday?”时，需要注意听工作人员的回答。工作人员回答周六的时间已经约满了，所以排除 this Saturday 这个干扰信息。接着提出最早的时间是 next Tuesday，提示词 available 在录音中被替换为 we can arrange for you。因此答案为 next Tuesday。注意不能漏掉 next。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 house；提示词 opposite、the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：定位词 house 出现后，答案信息随即出现：“It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.”注意排除干扰信息 Central Market，其前的介词为 near，不符合题干限定 opposite，而 opposite 在录音中被替换为 just across from（就在……对面）。因此答案为 Post Office。
